basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela has invited applications for the post of Project Fellow under the project “Design, fabrication, and characterization of a compact low frequency mechanical underwater noise generator”. Advertisement No. NITR/SR/2026/Advt.-25ID016/I/055 dated 03-07-2026 offers 01 position. Eligible candidates can submit applications and appear for Walk-in (Offline) Interview on 14-07-2026. Find all details about NIT Rourkela Project Fellow vacancy 2026, eligibility, remuneration, and application process here.

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech in any discipline with more than 60% marks in 10th, 12th and qualifying degrees OR M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics. One second-class is permitted in 10th or 12th. | Desirable Qualification: B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech in any discipline with more than 60% marks OR M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics. Candidate’s enrolment in Ph.D. program is contingent upon DRC approval. | Age Limit: Upper age limit is 28 years (relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female, 3 years for OBC Non-creamy layer) as on last date of application. | 3D modelling in Solid Works FEM Simulation in ANSYS/COMSOL MATLAB Programming with Hardware Polymer/Viscoelastic material modelling using TTS | This is a great opportunity to work with industry and associate with underwater acoustic test facility.

how_to_apply: Candidates must send the application and appear for Walk-in Interview.
Download and fill the application form from NIT Rourkela website.
Prepare a single PDF file containing filled & signed application + all supporting documents (educational certificates, mark sheets, research papers, experience certificates etc.).
Send the PDF by email to the PI/Co-PI with subject mentioning “Advertisement No.”.
Appear for Walk-in (Offline) Interview on 14-07-2026 at 10:00 AM in Department of Industrial Design.
No hard copies are required to be sent to the Institute.
important_instructions: Engagement is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed for interview. Mere possession of minimum qualification does not guarantee invitation to interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.
Application Link: NIT Rourkela Homepage → FACULTY & STAFF → SRICCE → Career → Notices

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for NIT Rourkela Project Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is on 14 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Fellow vacancies are available at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy under SR-25-ID-016 project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Fellow at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for NIT Rourkela Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: B.Tech/B.E. + M.Tech (or M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics) with more than 60% marks in qualifying examinations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to submit application for NIT Rourkela Project Fellow?
Q6. Is PhD enrolment mandatory for the Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidate’s enrolment in Ph.D. program is contingent upon DRC approval (for eligible candidates).

faq.question: Q7. Where will the NIT Rourkela Project Fellow interview be held?
faq.answer: Department of Industrial Design, NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience required for NIT Rourkela Project Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Experience in 3D modelling, FEM simulation, MATLAB, etc. is part of the job description.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Project Fellow position at NIT Rourkela permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for NIT Rourkela Project Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Send the complete application as a single PDF to the PI/Co-PI email and appear for Walk-in Interview on 14-07-2026.
